name: langchain.tool
description: LC tool invocation. Captured by the SDK callback handler's `on_tool_start` (Python) / `handleToolStart` (TS), persisted as its own trace row. Input is `{input_str | input, serialized, tool}` where `input_str` is the (often-stringified) tool argument the agent passed and `serialized` is LC's dump of the tool definition. Output is whatever the tool returned (string, dict, or list of docs). `parent_run_id` in input lets the dashboard link the tool back to the parent chain/agent run.
